name: Secure Application
description: This app provides policy management capabilities for proactive runtime app security

actions.name: Create New Policy
actions.description: Create a policy for an attack or vulnerability at runtime

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Type of Runtime Policy

parameters.name: application_id
parameters.description: Application that includes the tiers or services on which you require to apply the policy. Default value is "all"

parameters.name: tier_id
parameters.description: Application-specific tier to apply the policy. Default value is "all"

parameters.name: default_action
parameters.description: Default action for this policy. You can select IGNORE for no notifications for the runtime activity; select DETECT to detect the runtime activity; select BLOCK to block a specific runtime activity. Default value is "DETECT"

parameters.name: enable_policy
parameters.description: Select Yes/No to enable/disable the policy

actions.name: Create New Policy For Http Transaction Header
actions.description: Create a policy for headers in HTTP transactions

parameters.name: application_id
parameters.description: Application that includes the tiers or services on which you require to apply the policy. Default value is "all"

parameters.name: tier_id
parameters.description: Application-specific tier to apply the policy. Default value is "all"

parameters.name: default_action
parameters.description: Default action for this policy. You can select IGNORE for no notifications for the runtime activity; select DETECT to detect the runtime activity; select BLOCK to block a specific runtime activity. Default value is "DETECT"

parameters.name: enable_policy
parameters.description: Select Yes/No to enable/disable the policy

parameters.name: action for Strict-Transport-Security
parameters.description: Action for Strict-Transport-Security header. Default value is "DETECT"

parameters.name: patch value for Strict-Transport-Security
parameters.description: Value to patch for Strict-Transport-Security header. This value is applicable only if the action chosen is "PATCH"

parameters.name: action for X-Frame-Options
parameters.description: Action for X-Frame-Options header. Default value is "DETECT"

parameters.name: patch value for X-Frame-Options
parameters.description: Value to patch for X-Frame-Options header. This value is applicable only if the action chosen is "PATCH"

parameters.name: action for X-XSS-Protection
parameters.description: Action for X-XSS-Protection header. Default value is "DETECT"

parameters.name: patch value for X-XSS-Protection
parameters.description: Value to patch for X-XSS-Protection header. This value is applicable only if the action chosen is "PATCH"

parameters.name: action for X-Content-Type-Options
parameters.description: Action for X-Content-Type-Options header. Default value is "DETECT"

parameters.name: patch value for X-Content-Type-Options
parameters.description: Value to patch for X-Content-Type-Options header. This value is applicable only if the action chosen is "PATCH"

actions.name: Delete Policy
actions.description: Delete a runtime policy given its ID

parameters.name: policy_id
parameters.description: Unique Identifier for the policy.  The policy id is received in the response after the policy is created or listed.

actions.name: Get Policy By Id
actions.description: Retrieve details of a specific policy using its ID

parameters.name: policy_id
parameters.description: Unique Identifier for the policy.  The policy id is received in the response after the policy is created or listed.

actions.name: List All Policies
actions.description: Fetch and display all existing policies

actions.name: Update Policy
actions.description: Update an existing policy given its ID

parameters.name: policy_id
parameters.description: Unique Identifier for the policy.  The policy id is received in the response after the policy is created or listed.

parameters.name: application_id
parameters.description: Application that includes the tiers or services on which you require to apply the policy. Default value is "all"

parameters.name: tier_id
parameters.description: Application-specific tier to apply the policy. Default value is "all"

parameters.name: default_action
parameters.description: Default action for this policy. You can select IGNORE for no notifications for the runtime activity; select DETECT to detect the runtime activity; select BLOCK to block a specific runtime activity. Default value is "DETECT"

parameters.name: enable_policy
parameters.description: Select Yes/No to enable/disable the policy

actions.name: Add A Rule To Command Execution Policy
actions.description: Add a rule to the command execution policy to detect, ignore or block the runtime activity

parameters.name: policy_id
parameters.description: Unique Identifier for the policy.  The policy id is received in the response after the policy is created or listed.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Type of  match filter

parameters.name: operation
parameters.description: Operation for the match filter

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Value for the match filter

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Action to be taken if the filter matches
